name: groweasy-ai-csv-importer
description: AI-powered CSV importer that maps arbitrary spreadsheets into standardized CRM fields.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
